question:

forward and backward)?

as there are in the English alphabetical series (both
forward and backward)?
explanation: One such pair is there in forward and backward.

question:
How many such pairs of letters are in the word
“FLIPKART” which has as many letters between
them as there are in the English alphabetical series
(both forward and backward)?
questionHtml:
How many such pairs of letters are in the word
“FLIPKART” which has as many letters between
them as there are in the English alphabetical series
(both forward and backward)?
explanation:
F L I P K A R T (backward from A)
F L I P K A R T (forward from I)
F L I P K A R T (forward from P)
Here, three pairs formed i.e, AF, IK, and PT
explanationHtml:
F L I P K A R T (backward from A)
F L I P K A R T (forward from I)
F L I P K A R T (forward from P)
Here, three pairs formed i.e, AF, IK, and PT

question:
How many such pairs of letters are in the word
“INSPIRATION” which has as many letters between
them as there are in the English alphabetical series
(both forward and backward)?
questionHtml:
How many such pairs of letters are in the word
“INSPIRATION” which has as many letters between
them as there are in the English alphabetical series
(both forward and backward)?
explanation:
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from P)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from P)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from R)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Backward from N)
Here, seven pairs formed i.e, NP, NR, NT, PR, PT, RT,
and NO
explanationHtml:
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from N)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from P)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from P)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Forward from R)
I N S P I R A T I O N (Backward from N)
Here, seven pairs formed i.e, NP, NR, NT, PR, PT, RT,
and NO

question:

‘SEQUENTIAL’ each of which has as many letters
between them in the word as in the English Alphabet ?
questionHtml:

‘SEQUENTIAL’ each of which has as many letters
between them in the word as in the English Alphabet ?
explanation:

AE, NQ, NS, and QS.

question:

letters between them in the word as in the English

IN.
Clearly, 3 pairs are in the word.

question:
If it is possible to make a meaningful word with the
second, fourth, fifth, and eighth letters of the word
‘ACHIEVED’, then which of the following will be
the third letter from the right end of that meaningful
word? If no meaningful word can be made, give ‘X’
as the answer. If more than one meaningful word can
be made, give ‘Y’ as the answer.
questionHtml:
If it is possible to make a meaningful word with the
second, fourth, fifth, and eighth letters of the word
‘ACHIEVED’, then which of the following will be
the third letter from the right end of that meaningful
word? If no meaningful word can be made, give ‘X’
as the answer. If more than one meaningful word can
be made, give ‘Y’ as the answer.

question:
If all the consonants of the word ‘HAIRSTYLE’ are
replaced by succeeding letters in the alphabetical
series then how many vowels in new words?
questionHtml:
If all the consonants of the word ‘HAIRSTYLE’ are
replaced by succeeding letters in the alphabetical
series then how many vowels in new words?
explanation:
H A I R S T Y L E
Consonant replaced by succeeding letter: I A I S T U
Z M E
No of Vowels in new word is - A I I U E
explanationHtml:
H A I R S T Y L E

Z M E

question:
If all the even numbered place value letters of the
word " LANDSCAPE " are replaced by the
immediately next alphabet according to English
alphabet, then all letters are arranged in reverse
alphabetical order from left to right then find which
alphabet will appear exactly in the middle of the
word?
questionHtml:
If all the even numbered place value letters of the
word " LANDSCAPE " are replaced by the
immediately next alphabet according to English
alphabet, then all letters are arranged in reverse
alphabetical order from left to right then find which
alphabet will appear exactly in the middle of the
word?
explanation:
1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9
L A N D S C A P E
Even numbered place value letters are replaced
immediately next alphabet: L B O E S D A Q E
All letters are arranged in reverse alphabetical order:
Q S N L E E D B A
Letter that appear exactly in the middle-
Q S N L E E D B A
explanationHtml:
1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9
L A N D S C A P E
Even numbered place value letters are replaced
immediately next alphabet: L B O E S D A Q E
All letters are arranged in reverse alphabetical order:
Q S N L E E D B A
Letter that appear exactly in the middle-
Q S N L E E D B A

question:
If all the letters INFLUENCE are replaced by their
opposite letter according to the English alphabet then
what is the difference between the number of
consonants and vowels?
questionHtml:
If all the letters INFLUENCE are replaced by their
opposite letter according to the English alphabet then
what is the difference between the number of
consonants and vowels?
explanation:
I N F L U E N C E
Letters are replaced by their opposite: R M U O F V
M X V
Letter according to english alphabet
No. of consonants are 7 = R M F V M X V
No.of vowels are 2 = U O
Therefore, difference between number of consonants
are vowels
7-2=5
explanationHtml:
I N F L U E N C E
Letters are replaced by their opposite: R M U O F V
M X V
Letter according to english alphabet
No. of consonants are 7 = R M F V M X V
No.of vowels are 2 = U O
Therefore, difference between number of consonants
are vowels
